ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISCHANGED(Quantity__c) && NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Draft')) && NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Submitted')) && NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Purchasing Review')) && NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Approver Review')) && NOT( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'For Ordering') && (PO_Status__c = 'Sent to Supplier' || PO_Status__c = 'Partially Fulfilled') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are no longer allowed to edit quantity.
